career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: 'Z.ai GLM-5: New SOTA Open Weights LLM' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%) reporting on OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta. Cites: according to this blog post

factors.name: Evidence Quality
factors.rationale: references specific benchmarks: MMLU benchmark; references academic work; specific figures cited: 'SMG”) claiming +92%', '% throughput and 275%', '(80B) claiming 70.6%'

factors.name: Reproducibility
factors.rationale: references open source code/models; methodology described

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: 'Z.ai GLM-5: New SOTA Open Weights LLM' uses heavy hype language (10.0/10) -- claim likely ahead of expert consensus; hedging language ('up to ', 'potentially', 'could be') suggests the source itself isn't confident

factors.name: Specificity
factors.rationale: vague hedging: 'up to ', 'potentially', 'could be', 'might be'; cites concrete figures: 'SMG”) claiming +92%', '% throughput and 275%', '(80B) claiming 70.6%'

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) on OpenAI/Anthropic topics -- insufficient history to assess
